sglang.title: Use trtllm_mla decode kernel for draft extend in speculative decoding
sglang.author: Qiaolin-Yu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation


Before this pr, draft extend is using flashinfer_mla kernel. However, since flashinfer_mla doesn't support fp8, when using fp8 kv cache, it needs to dequantize kv to bf16, which is very slow (shown in figure).
After this pr,

python3 -m sglang.bench_serving --backend sglang-oai --datase

vllm.author: helunwencser
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary: in_the_same_node_as is only called on the host. This PR makes is_in_the_same_node to be created on the host directly; otherwise, this function fails if torch.set_default_device() is called during device initialization because is_in_the_same_node will be created on the device by default.
